title: Add pause/resume to study timer and daily motivational quote to dashboard

requirements.summary: Add pause and resume functionality to StudyTimer component with state preservation
acceptanceCriteria: When timer is running, a Pause button is visible
Clicking Pause stops the timer but preserves elapsed time
When timer is paused, a Resume button is visible
Clicking Resume continues counting from the paused elapsed time
Stop button remains available to end the session and save time

file_operations.description: Add pause/resume state management to the StudyTimer component. Introduce a new state variable to track paused status (isPaused). When running, show both Pause and Stop buttons. When paused, show Resume and Stop buttons. Ensure the elapsed time accumulates correctly across pause/resume cycles by preserving the elapsed seconds in state and adjusting the start time reference when resuming. The Start button should only appear when the timer is not running and not paused.

requirements.summary: Ensure StudyTimer tracks time separately per selected chapter with accurate accumulation
acceptanceCriteria: Timer only runs when a chapter is selected
Accumulated time is saved to the correct chapter when Stop is clicked
Switching chapters resets the timer display
Each chapter maintains its own separate accumulated study time

file_operations.description: Ensure the component properly resets timer state (elapsed seconds and paused status) when the selectedChapter prop changes. Add a useEffect hook that watches selectedChapter and clears the timer state on change. Verify that the addStudyTimeToChapter mutation is called with the correct chapter name when Stop is clicked, ensuring time accumulation is per-chapter. The component already receives selectedChapter as a prop and uses it in the mutation.

requirements.summary: Add daily motivational quote display component to the dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: A quote card is visible on the dashboard
The quote changes daily based on the current date
The quote is displayed in a visually appealing format consistent with the warm earth-tone design theme
A collection of at least 10-15 motivational quotes is available for rotation

file_operations.description: Create a new MotivationalQuote component that displays a daily motivational quote. Define an array of at least 15 inspirational quotes related to studying and learning. Use the current date to deterministically select a quote from the array (e.g., day of year modulo array length). Display the quote in a Card component with styling consistent with the warm earth-tone palette (terracotta, sage, cream). Include a quote icon and format the text with appropriate typography.

Import and add the MotivationalQuote component to the dashboard layout. Place it prominently near the top of the page, above the existing progress cards grid. Ensure it spans the full width for visual impact and integrates smoothly with the existing dashboard layout and styling.
